name: Plonky
author: Poki
description: Plonky is a ragdoll physics puzzle adventure! Guide Plonky, a wobbly hero, through wild levels packed with traps, saws, crushers, and clever contraptions. Push, pull, lift, and swing your way past mind-bending obstacles using carts, pulleys, switches, and more. Every level is a fun challenge full of chaos and creativity! Can you master the madness and guide Plonky through the mayhem? How to play Plonky? Move left or right: A/D or the left and right arrow key Jump: W or the up arrow key or the space bar Climb down: S or the down arrow key Who created Plonky? Plonky is created by Gametornado. Play their other games on Poki: Bow Mania , Bullet Bros , Death Chase , Dreadhead Parkour , Eugene's Life , Flip Bros , Jelly Cat , Lucky Life , Mini Train , Mophead Dash , Parkour Jump , Poor Eddie , Rio Rex , Sharkosaurus Rampage , Short Life , Short Life 2 , and Short Ride ! How can I play Plonky for free? You can play Plonky for free on Poki. Can I play Plonky on mobile devices and desktop? Plonky can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
